review_title: A Great Personal or Business Website Hosting Solution
description: So far my experience is very positive. I put together my website in a few minutes, using AI. However, I changed all the verbage to my own writing. However, I kept the formatting. I also changed the images to my own. My site looks very professional.
author: Maragaret L.
pros: It's inexpensive, easy to use and it offers a basic ecommerce system which is all I need. However, if I want to upgrade, I can use other well-known systems such as woocommerce.
cons: I like everything, but if I could change anything I would have it integrate with Gelato and print-on-demand company. However it already integrates with Printable, which is nice to use for my art prints.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Hosting with superior customer support
description: I’m glad using Hostinger and the customer support is the best! If you are looking to create multiple sites, Hostinger!!!
author: Denise D.
pros: I have used Hostinger for many years, hosting and managing multiple WordPress sites. This is so far the best hosting offer for WP. The AI website builder is also great!
cons: A single month payment is a bit high, but when you’re in business, you can go with a 2-year plan and this is the best discount.

review_title: AI hallucinates and is completely unable to resolve the simplest problems.
description: Biggest nightmare in 30years of maintaining a website. I wish I'd never seen their ad, and now I have to try to get my money back, try to find a different host and start all over.
author: Gerald S.
pros: cheap, seemingly easy to use interface. They suggested they could easily and quickly migrate my site and domain. However the support is nonexistent.
cons: AI is the only support. The AI bot contradicts itself repeatedly, suggesting fixes that don't work for simple issues like connecting domain to website. After 8 days, it hasn't been able to help get my domain connected to my website, no matter how many times I click the "connect" button, or ask the AI for assistance. It tells you it will take 'about an hour', then 'up to 24 hrs,' then 48 hrs, then 72 hrs. Then it tells you to reverse the setting it recommended to begin with. Changes will take effect in "about an hour". 48hrs. later the issue is still unresolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best and Easiest Website Hosting I have found
description: Hostinger provides an easy to learn and ease platform to creating websites, hosting them and managing them as well. It makes integrating with Word Press and other programs for managing the websites easy. I like their support system for helping time for any issue as well.
author: Jess A.
pros: I use Hostinger to host, create, and manage my websites. Hostinger makes it so much easy and efficient.
cons: I like Hostinger for the low prices and startup prices for getting new domains but I don't like the renewal price I have to pay for the domain. it is a bit expensive.

review_title: Hostinger for your website building
description: My overall experience with hosting her has been great. I haven’t had encountered any major problems. Any small issues. Customer service would solve right away or I could email them and they respond within two days. I’ve been using hosting her for my website for over two years and not planning to change anytime soon.
author: Pawan R.
pros: What are like most about Hostinger is that it’s user-friendly great value for your money good customer service and room to expand and grow within the software
cons: Some things are hard to navigate to find. Also it’s very simple so you won’t be able to do the more in-depth things that you can find on other platforms.

review_title: Affordable and Easy Hosting for Small Websites
description: Overall a reliable hosting service for small websites and beginners. Easy to manage, fast loading speeds, and good value.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Affordable hosting with good performance. Easy setup, simple control panel, and helpful tools for building websites quickly.
cons: Customer support response can sometimes be slow. Some advanced features require higher plans. Occasional minor downtime.

review_title: Deploy a fast, easy and affordable Node.js project to Hostinger.
description: Deploying my Node.js app was a great experience, even though I encountered a few failures during my first deployment. However, it eventually succeeded. The issue stemmed from my script. Node.js hosting only requires running npm start, but I added other steps. This means if the hosting provider only needs a project with a “npm start” script, it simplifies deployment for beginners and makes connecting to the domain much easier.
author: Yudhawan Anis S.
pros: We have a lot of packages to rent for hosting and VPS. The simple dashboard page simply displays some information and offers to the user. There’s no rich text regarding offer and package details.
cons: When I want to deploy my Node.js app after purchasing the package, I’m taken to a page displaying three option offers. I don’t choose any and end up stuck. Eventually, I notice a small text “deploy Node.js project” and click it. Why should Hostinger make this information so small?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Hostinger freaking awesome
description: I have been with them now 4 months and i have 2 websites with them one hostinger ai builder and the other word press
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Hostinger is my go to for webhosting and e-commerce they are priced well lots of features and customer service is great
cons: I dont have any cons. I really am satified so nothing to report for the cons. Hostinger is great really
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Node.js Hosting on Hostinger:
description: my experience with Hostinger has been good for small nodejs deployments. setup is fast. it is not ideal for heavier workload but for lightweight apps it is practical.
author: Bersufekad M.
pros: It is easy to deploy a Node.js app on a shared hosting without managing a full vps. The control panel is simple to use and node environment setup is fast
cons: It have a limited controle and resource cap on shared Node.js hosting. When the app experiences higher load, performance can drop and 503 errors can occur.

review_title: Fish and chips
author: Damian G.
pros: Was using this for hosting vps server for clients, no issues with setuping it also support was helpfull with some issues.
cons: I think renewal pricing could be a little bit cheaper when comparing to competition for the same service
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good Deal Only For basic Needs for a page
description: I got the promo to try Hostinger but its a lie about the whole deal since if you want to take payments in your website so if you want a ecommerce store you have still upgrade to a business plan. The $30 dollasr its for the very basic if you want more you have to uprade.
author: Jonathan V.
pros: I mean it works, has enough tools for a website.
cons: If you are taking payments it limits you to use only 2 providers that they have, like Stripe there's not even square payments option.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great option for small or simple projects.
description: We switched to Hostinger after a very bad interaction with a competitor's customer service, the experience has been great so far. It's everything we expected and wanted plus a few extras.
author: Fernando D.
pros: Their customer support is great, documentation is very good, the service they provide is very good too and their menus and overall website management tools are great.
cons: Sometimes it might feel like they hold your hand more than is necessary when setting up things, but this can be a very good thing for users who are not very technically inclined.

review_title: The Best Website Provider!
description: We have two websites with Zyro. They offer yearly plans which saves us time and money!
author: Aoleon K.
pros: It's very easy to build and create your own website. Using Ecommerce is the best way for us to have every tool needed to expand our company. The templates are very professional and fun, adding products and customization is amazing! Having the opportunity to sell through multiple channels without leaving Zyro is a PLUS! You get so many tools for the price and that's more than you can get anywhere else.
cons: Having an announcement bar would be a huge perk for us.

review_title: Feel home for hosting at hostinger
description: I am using Hostinger since 2016. It has been awesome since then. Its the first choice for shared web hosting. because of NO-DOWN-TIME and affordable price for what it offers. For clients, I get emails also at affordable cost. Cloud hosting is also awesome. It has mine craft server, which is obviously a good news for all the hostinger users.
author: Manoj Kishore N.
pros: The hosting is super easy. Nice Uptime, Easy to deploy your site/saas, Awesome customer support. Affordable for all. Its the winner among the competitors.
cons: Telephonic support. Limited disk space slows down the site.

review_title: Hostinger review Nov, 22
description: Overall, if I wasn't very happy with Hostinger's service I wouldn't give them 20 minutes from my valuable time to write this review, they have my high recommendations and I've recently upgraded my plan for my ecommerce store from Web hosting starter plan to Cloud startup plan which is faster and better for SEO with Staging feature which is very important if you would like make changes to the live environment with minimum downtime and less mistakes.
author: Osama D.
pros: Hostinger's features and services are higher than its cheap cost, and the best thing you'd ever search for in other reviews is their customer care service. Their support team is very helpful and available 24/7. They made my life easy.
cons: Their web hosting service wasn't as stable as today, now it's perfect. They need sometimes more than 15 min to answer on the Chat box but it's not that long time.

review_title: Hostinger is more than a wordpress websites hosting
description: Hostinger definitely makes it easy to work as a WordPress developer, especially when it comes to multiple websites. After trying several hosting providers, I can say that they are the most successful I have found. It's worth a try.
author: Eldar P.
pros: Hostinger provides website hosting with an advanced website management interface that includes everything you need include buying a domain, quick WordPress website setup, and email inbox for your website. The interface provides very easy control over multiple websites, and what I really liked is that there is the option to disable WordPress plugins directly from the Hostinger interface in a user-friendly way, its really important thing when some plugin is breaking your site and you can't enter your site dashbord. I was also impressed that the login is with a Google account, which provides convenience and a reliable level of security. In case of a problem, there is 24/7 support from chat representatives who are always happy to help. In conclusion, at Hostinger I found a satisfactory solution for managing multiple WordPress websites in one place.
cons: The only downside I can mention is that when I tried to transfer an existing site from another hosting provider, it wasn't very easy for me. I couldn't transfer it smoothly as-is and I had to make a lot of adjustments. However, some of the sites were transferred more smoothly. It depends on which hosting provider the site comes from, so it's not entirely Hostinger's fault.

review_title: The easiest and less restrictive editor, hands down
description: I needed a landing page and a portfolio of sorts. i am using my website to mee those needs. With an already busy schedule, I really didn't want to learn anything or have to hire someone and pay thousands for something so small and simple. My friend recommended this and I could not be happier. I love that with the Zyro editor, things just work.
author: Oscar G.
pros: After waiting for so long to getting a website going, I finally found one and used the Zyro editor to build my page. I was very happy to see that the editor didn't restrict me from moving things where I wanted them and how I wanted them. I love my freedom too much so this was great. Adding new elements to my website was a quick 2 minute tutorial that helped me really customize my site to make it really mine.
cons: Add more categories to types of services like IT services, mechanic, gardening.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Cheap, Generous and Easy to navigate webhosting
description: I had a smooth experience, it was very easy to setup my WordPress website on the hosting even my website on smf and HTML, I had no need of using an FTP since the file manager was to efficient to handle it
author: Israel J.
pros: Very Cheap, Easy to navigate interface and I love the fact that they created a free hosting to practice and even gave a discount to upgrade from there, The file manager is the best ever used because it's interface can be navigated easily, you can copy, cut, upload and extract zip files which makes an FTP almost useless
cons: The free hosting project gets disabled after two weeks of inactivity or traffic, it also has a banner below the website it's hosting, so it can't be used for production purposes

review_title: Business website platform
description: I would describe my overall experience with Hostinger as positive. My website is up and running and easy to manage/update.
author: Roxann D.
pros: I like how easy it was to set up and manage a website with hostinger. The platform was very minimal but AI definitely works well
cons: My least favorite thing about hostinger is you have to look up some features online to figure out to us it.

review_title: Outperformed my expectations of being a limited but simple drag-and-drop designer
description: Overall I was surprised how well it performed in terms of background capabilities. The drag-and-drop is mostly easily usable.
author: Eva I.
pros: Surprisingly powerful considering its low cost and drag-and-drop approach. Offers hostinf and domain registration.
cons: Still some limitations to customization and admin panel. Minor tecnhicality - when using the drag-and-drop designer on a smaller (laptop) screen, then the page is so small that it is difficult to move sections around.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Worst Support ever
description: Shittiest support ever, They suspend your domain out of no where. Their chat bot latterly never response and their agents as well.
author: Sandeep J.
pros: Cheap in the market and easy to host. Nothing much.
cons: The most unreliable support system. They does not have call center and never respond to that chats.

review_title: A good host with slightly confusing tools
description: I used Hostinger for a few websites, domains and associated email addresses. The experience was mostly good, the websites were quick to set up, but I ended up limited with some of the options of the builder.
author: Michel B.
pros: Hostinger is a good host offering a huge variety of services, being able to be the only hosting provider a business needs. Its comprehensive dashboard offers a lot of help with setting up each service. Its website builder is easy to use.
cons: The dashboard can be unnecessarily complicated for some operations, requiring some trial and error sometimes to get it to do what is needed. The website builder can sometimes be tricky to use when doing anything advanced, and it generates pages which cannot be copied or modified easily with another tool.

review_title: Reliable and good but expensive
author: Aakash P.
pros: Hostinger always has some good deals, especially for new users. The service is reliable and the features offered as part of their plans are decent.
cons: Their WordPress plans aren't the most affordable for existing users as new users get the best deals.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Lightning fast loading times and super easy dashboard to access!
description: Love Hostinger! Wouldn't replace it for a thing. They care about me so I care back. They've given me great offers so far and I've created some very fast websites with them, so can't complain,
author: Amanda B.
pros: Everybody gets Hostinger because of how fast their loading times are. I love love love how easy it is to get your way around the dashboard. I love that buttons are easy to access and that you can get started with web hosting even as a beginner who knows little to nothing about code or about web hosting. The buttons are a beautiful purple and are very aesthetically pleasing. The dashboard just makes you want to stay for long. It is super easy to sign in because they use a one-click Google account sign-in which is very easy to understand. Their chat and support make everything easy to access and easy to understand. They very quickly solve client problems which makes them very loveable.
cons: You, unfortunately, cannot pay for a service before it expires. You must wait till it expires. This sometimes limits my planning. For people who code, there are not enough tutorials on how to upload your HTML, CSS, and Javascript website using File Manager.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Premium service and support at an affordable price.
description: Quality hosting services with fast and accurate support. Fair price. For a long time as a customer I have nothing to praise.
author: Luiz Eduardo M.
pros: Ease of hiring, professional availability infrastructure and fast support. Several years as a customer and many sites and domains hosted and no incidents.
cons: At first, because I was leaving the interface of traditional panels, I was a little resilient, but soon after, I see that everything is very simple and functional. I like everything today.
